name: dev-factory
description: Symphony-style automated development factory using GLM-5. Discovers project ideas from GitHub Trending, CVE databases, and security news → builds complete, tested Python projects → publishes to GitHub and tracks progress in Notion. Self-correction loop (error → fix → retry, max 3 times). Use when you want to automate development, create security tools, or generate DevOps utilities.
author: rebugui
